Appearances:
Plaintiff Mary Tam is present
Attorney David Foran for Plaintiff
Defendants Tak Kan Yan & Kin Keung Gee(Jin Kin Keung) are present
Attorney Greg Palomares for defendant Kin Keung Gee and to assist Tak Kan Yan

The Judge Pro Tem & litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of August 06, 2018 remains on calendar.
